# ListSignal

> Shopify store intelligence platform. Discover tech stacks, installed apps, revenue signals and contact data for millions of Shopify stores. Updated daily.

## Store Profiles
Individual store analysis pages with tech stack, apps, scoring, and contact data.
- [Store Directory](/store)

## Technology Pages
Pages for each tracked technology showing all stores using it.
- [App Directory](/apps)

## Comparison Pages
Side-by-side comparisons of Shopify apps and technologies.
- [Example: Klaviyo vs Mailchimp](/compare/klaviyo-vs-mailchimp)
- [Example: ReCharge vs Bold Subscriptions](/compare/recharge-vs-bold-subscriptions)

## Top Store Rankings
Ranked lists of Shopify stores by country and technology.
- [Top Shopify Stores US](/top/shopify-stores-us)
- [Top Shopify Stores UK](/top/shopify-stores-gb)
- [Top Stores Using Klaviyo](/top/shopify-stores-using-klaviyo)

## Directories
- [All Tracked Apps](/apps)
- [All Countries](/countries)

## Pricing
- Explorer (Free): 50 lookups/month
- Pro ($79/month): Unlimited lookups, full data, API, CSV exports
